## [00:00 - 01:02]

In our society we spend lots of time on our visual image and your visual image is the way you dress and your body language And when you reveal to your clients you walk into their homes or you meet them for lunch or dinner when they see you and you Reveal your visual image. They start to form Assumptions about who you are if you've got good posture don't make the assumption Oh, this person seems confident if you dress a certain way They make the assumption or they seem like a professional and if you've got a smile on your face They make the assumption all this person's warm there They're friendly these are assumptions and then you sit down at the table and you reveal to them What's known as your vocal image when you speak? People start to form thoughts and opinions about who you are as a person in our society We tend to spend no time on our vocal image, but this is how important vocal images Once the person sees your visual image and then you reveal your vocal image They now start to form beliefs about who you are as a person whether you're successful whether you're credible yet This is the one area We rarely spend time on So I'd love to share with you a quick master class on vocal mastery
